entry.title: Re: Security Audit Log (SAL): One directory for all SAL files
entry.content:
Hello,

During a replatforming project, how to manage SAL "files legacy history copy" when we reduce app. servers number. (from 3 AS on source -> 2 AS on  target) ? Where AS3 files can be stored on target as naming pattern file is the same on each server.

Thanks

FM

entry.title: Re: Creation of accounts
entry.content: Yes, please contact your consultant for more support on setting up the basics for your SAP system.

entry.title: Re: MIRO Exit
entry.content:
There is a FAQ note on this subject 1156325 - BAdIs in the Logistics Invoice Verification environment describing some BAdis and in your case BAdI INVOICE_UPDATE for customer check.

What's your exact version?

NB: For old customer-exits, check the EXIT_SAPLMR1M_* FM in the LMR1M00* enhancements.

entry.title: Re: AW01N - values for ordinary depreciation have changed...
entry.content:
I had this situation with a customer that system required AFAR because previous FY has not been properly closed in legacy system. Have the users executed sucessfuly all AFAR, all AFAB runs as well as AJAB for 2024?

Another points which system might be asking recalculation of depreciation are differences in rounding settings or posting control (compare T093 and T093B tables). If this is the case, if you test AFAR it will show which assets have planned values not yet corrected in 2024.

entry.title: Re: Consumption reversal fails from CO13 for missing entr...
entry.content: @EdwinE I'd report the issue to SAP support then. It looks like /SCWM/TIMBWA is queried with the incorrect reason, blank instead of CSMO.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Data Cloud - FAQs
entry.content: What's the positioning of SAP Databricks versus SAP AI Core ?

entry.title: Re: under Ordinary Depreciation classification we are tak...
entry.content: Check rounding settings in OAYO

entry.title: Wrong DUNS number synced to Procurement via sourcingnetworkid
entry.content:
Dear all,

we have the issue that every now and then the DUNS number set in Procurement gets overwritten from sourcing (the DUNS number in procuremt is required since the supplier validates it during POSR). I saw that we have a missmatch between transactionnetworkid &
sourcingnetworkid. Since sourcing was implemented before buying, sourcing uses a different SBN supplier than the one we have a TR with in Procurement. No attempt to align the IDs in Ariba worked yet.

Does maybe someone of you have suggestions on how this could be solved or the auto update be stoped?

Thank you a lot in andvance and best regards, Christoph

entry.title: Re: MIRO Exit
entry.content: AFAIK : For Fiori application Manage Supplier Invoice ?

entry.title: error=HTTP operation failed invoking https://eu10.cim.cloud.sap/api/cim-scim/v2/Groups
entry.content:
Dear All

I a running jobs to write groups from IAS to SAP BTP central invoice management.

Source=IAS , Target= B TP Central Invoice Management

when I run the job getting error 

error=HTTP operation failed invoking https://eu10.cim.cloud.sap/api/cim-scim/v2/Groups with statusCode: 401, Response: {"message":"Unauthorized","status":401},

I checked using postman this URL and I get response.

Please help with this issue as I cant figure it out.

thank you,

ebsor

entry.title: Re: Couldn't subscribe to SAP Build Apps. Try again.
entry.content: its working for me now via Boosters. Looks like SAP updated few things very recently, since the same steps didn't worked earlier . Thanks .

entry.title: Re: Enhanced Security for Installation with Software Provisioning Manager (SWPM / SAPinst)
entry.content:
In isolated networks, direct access to external CRL sources is often not possible. Therefore, a current copy of the crlbag.p7s file must be regularly replicated to an internally accessible location. For example a simple script can download the file daily from the SAP Trust Center Services URL:

 Linux:

``` #!/bin/bash

# Configuration
REMOTE_URL="https://tcs.mysap.com/crl/crlbag.p7s"
LOCAL_PATH="/opt/sap/crl/crlbag.p7s"
LOG_FILE="/var/log/crl_sync.log"

# Download the file
curl -o "$LOCAL_PATH" "$REMOTE_URL" --silent --fail
if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then
echo "$(date) - CRLBag successfully downloaded." >> "$LOG_FILE"
else
echo "$(date) - Error downloading CRLBag." >> "$LOG_FILE"
fi
```

This script can be executed daily with a cron job, in this example the file will be downloaded daily at 2AM:

```bash
0 2 * * * /path/to/script.sh
```

Windows:

```batch
@echo off
set REMOTE_URL=https://tcs.mysap.com/crl/crlbag.p7s
set LOCAL_PATH=C:\sap\crl\crlbag.p7s
set LOG_FILE=C:\sap\crl\crl_sync.log
 
:: Download the file
powershell -Command "Invoke-WebRequest -Uri %REMOTE_URL% -OutFile %LOCAL_PATH%" 2>> %LOG_FILE%
if %ERRORLEVEL% == 0 (
echo %DATE% %TIME% - CRLBag successfully downloaded. >> %LOG_FILE%
) else (
echo %DATE% %TIME% - Error downloading CRLBag. >> %LOG_FILE%
)
```

This script can be executed daily using the Windows Task Scheduler.

Make sure that the downloaded file is available in the systems in the systems SAPinst will run. SAPinst can be started with the corresponding parameter configuration:

Linux:

SAPINST_CRL_SOURCE_URL=file:///opt/sap/crl/crlbag.p7s

Windows:

set SAPINST_CRL_SOURCE_URL=file:///C:/sap/crl/crlbag.p7s

entry.title: Re: SAC - Creation of planning version from admin cockpit
entry.content: Hey @JefB, I am considering this approach. Could you please tell me how you automatically fill out the attributes of the copy-pasted versions in each model from the public dimension?

entry.title: Re: 🇮🇳 SAP CodeJam ABAP: SAP BTP, ABAP Environment & RAP (Chennai, India)
entry.content: I’m really excited about this opportunity and have already marked my interest. Sincerely hope to receive the invite soon. Looking forward to seeing you all in class!

entry.title: Re: Can not extend lagacy sap ui5 app in VSCode ?
entry.content:
Hi Nadim,

Extending a legacy SAP Fiori application is supported in SAP Business Application Studio, with most of the functionality that is available in SAP Web IDE Full-Stack. It is also possible to migrate an SAPUI5 extension project from SAP Web IDE into Business Application Studio dev space and continue working with it.

You can find the official documentation with all the specific details here: 

  • https://help.sap.com/docs/bas/developing-sap-fiori-app-in-sap-business-application-studio/adaptation-project-for-on-premise-system
  • https://help.sap.com/docs/bas/developing-sap-fiori-app-in-sap-business-application-studio/migration

Note that for legacy applications that are supported for extension via an Adaptation project, this one will be created (and not an SAPUI5 extension project). This is according to SAP best practices.

In case you don't already have a license to SAP Business Application Studio, you can try this out (not for production usage of course) in SAP BTP Trial or using an SAP BTP free tier account. See here: https://help.sap.com/docs/bas/sap-business-application-studio/getting-started

Thanks,
Rotem

entry.title: SAP Q02 BMAX Workflow Tracker no reflect created part number
entry.content:
Hi there,

My situation is the part number has done created in status 18. To make it become status 19 and above, I need to check the workflow pending for which approver. 

Here comes the problem. T-code "/LVX/BMAX_WF_TRACKER - Workflow Tracker Report " not showing the created part number and approver does not receive any workflow in their inbox. I am sure the part number successfully created as it can be view in MM03 with status 18.

Can anyone provide me some idea or suggestion for me to view the workflow?

Thank You in advance~

entry.title: Re: 🇮🇳 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core (Bangalore, India)

I find this a great opportunity to explore how Python and SAP can come together. I’m really excited about this opportunity and have already marked my interest. Sincerely hope to receive the invite soon. Looking forward to seeing you all in class!

entry.title: My Journey Towards Becoming an SAP FICO Consultant
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

My name is Omar, and I'm writing from Morocco. I'm excited to share my journey towards becoming an SAP FICO consultant and to connect with others on a similar path.

My introduction to SAP began with the SAP Technology Professional Certificate program on Coursera. This course provided a solid foundation in enterprise environments, SAP solution design, and implementation. While completing the program, I began engaging with the SAP Community, and through those interactions, I discovered my strong interest in SAP FICO. My background in financial consulting and project management made it clear that this specialization would be a perfect fit.

I was particularly excited about the SAP Customer Success Academy program and believed my skills and the SAP Technology Professional Certificate would make me a strong candidate. I carefully prepared my application and submitted it with high hopes. I was eager to gain hands-on experience and learn from SAP experts. However, I was not selected for the program.

While I'm still exploring the reasons, I suspect my location may be a significant factor. The programs seem to be primarily based in Germany, Dubai, or Qatar, and not in Morocco. This experience has highlighted the challenges of accessing SAP opportunities in regions where SAP presence might be developing.

Despite this setback, I remain determined to pursue a career in SAP FICO. I'm now focusing on deepening my knowledge of SAP FICO and seeking alternative opportunities to gain hands-on experience. I'm particularly interested in:

  • Learning Resources: I'm actively researching quality online courses, books, and practice systems for SAP FICO.
  • Community Engagement: I'm committed to learning from experienced consultants and contributing to the SAP Community.
  • Location Challenges: I'm also exploring ways to overcome location barriers when applying for SAP programs and building a local SAP community presence in Africa, as I noticed there isn't a dedicated board for Africa in the Location Groups.
  • Alternative Programs: I am looking for other programs similar to the SAP Customer Success Academy, or information on how to overcome location barriers when applying to such programs.

I believe in the power of community and collaboration. I'm eager to connect with anyone who can offer guidance, share their experiences, or provide insights on building a successful career in SAP FICO.

If you have any recommendations for learning resources, career advice, insights on building a local SAP community, or information regarding alternatives to the SAP customer success Academy, I would be grateful to hear from you.

Thank you for being a part of my journey!

Sincerely,

entry.title: sap BTP BUILD Apps no authorization for ABAP System
entry.content:
Hi Team , 

In BTP cloud i have created destination for ABAP and connection is success and reachable .

The issue is from BUILD App , when trying to access the ABAP system via the destination created in BTP Cockpit we are getting below error .

Error message :  "You don't have permission to access this system. Choose another system or reach out to your admin."

Please suggest solution . 

 

Error Image:

Destination Detail

entry.title: Re: Simulation Feature for Business Rules?
entry.content:
Hi Reza,

I haven't been able to find that feature either in any of the official SAP documentation. 

For time management specifically there is the Time Account Simulator which can be enabled to simulate accruals 2479225 - How to enable Time Account Simulator - SAP for Me

For other purposes, the rule trace can be useful to check any potential issues related to rule execution - Creating Business Rule Execution Logs | SAP Help Portal

Other than that, there are some Check Tool validations that can be carried out for rules.

Hope that helps.


Iulia

entry.title: Re: Adding Custom Fields in WZR1,WZR2 and WZR3
entry.content: Nicely explained. Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAC - Creation of planning version from admin cockpit
entry.content: @Sebastian_Gesiarz you still can't copy the attributes along. I use scripting on the generic public dimension to get to the attributes in each story.

entry.title: Re: How to set up multi-currency bank?
entry.content:
First read these instructions (KBA) on how to solve your case..

  • 3502313 - Message no. FINS_ACDOC_POST094 while posting payments in the currency other than the bank account currency. 
  • 3115215 - Message no. FINS_ACDOC_POST094 - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

(Basically the creation of a new house bank and account with the same bank key and account number, but in a different currency)

entry.title: Re: sap BTP BUILD Apps no authorization for ABAP System
entry.content:
@Chandra_Solleti 

In BTP Cockpit, Left menu - Security - Users - pick your user and click on Assigned Role Collections - Assign the missing role collections to your user and click Save.

Now you will be able to create in SAP Build Apps - Lobby for Abap Cloud

entry.title: Re: The power of AI Agents: My Journey with LangGraph
entry.content: Brilliantly captured all the relevant aspects for beginners and intermediate learners. Thank you Arun!

entry.title: Re: ADT access to ABAP Trial
entry.content:
Could you try to delete the ADT project and to re-create it using the current URL of the ABAP trial instance?

Background: In case of expiration of the trial account and re-registration the user could have been provisioned on a different ABAP instance with a different endpoint URL and the existing ADT project may not work anymore.

Related: https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/authorization-required-access-to-login-sap-btp-trial-on-eclipse/m-p/14028435/highlight/true#M2038632

entry.title: Re: From User Exits to RAP: Adopting a Clean Core Approach in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi @RavdeepSingh / @Balaji_Guptha ,
Thanks for the blog. We are in S4HANA 2023 Private cloud, I have implemented the Event Consumption model for the outbound delivery. Activated the event in SWEC and SWETYPV tcode. 

When we post the PGI, how to trigger the local event consumption model class ? Whether it will not trigger for GUI tcode like VL02N or it will trigger only for the RAP events. Please suggest.

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: Bonus Calculation Explanation - Variable Pay
entry.content: Hello! Thanks @xavierlegarrec we will investigate your proposed answer. As per @catmoye we do not use goals. So thats why we have additive formula, base + individual performance enabled. Please check the screenshot from the bonus calculation that I added at the question's body text. Last, the target percentage you mentioned, where is defined and assigned to each employee in the system?

entry.title: Dynamically extract a field value & then insert it to a field on SOAP Header of async respons
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have requirement that has to be acheived on SAP PO/PI .. this is regarding asynchronous request ans asynch response scenario.. where in the asnych request message we receive "MessageID" field value in SOAP envelope header and there is an asynchronous response where that MessageID value from request message has to be extracted & then insert it to another field "RelatesTo" of asynch response (a field on SOAP Header level).. Could you please guide me to acheive this requirement in SAP PO 7.5 single stack?

Sample asynch request

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="" xmlns:soapenc="" xmlns:xsd="" xmlns:xsi="">
<soapenv:Header xmlns:wsa= xmlns:wsse="">
<wsa:MessageID>f3d02d20e2821edfbaa386b6c489d7de</wsa:MessageID>
<wsa:RelatesTo>f3d02d20e2821edfbaa386b6c489d7de</wsa:RelatesTo>
</soapenv:Header>
<soapenv:Body>
<ns0:cancelRequest>
<ns1:PIwort>
</ns1:PIwort>
</ns1:cancelRequest>

Sample asynch response

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="" xmlns:soapenc="" xmlns:xsd="" xmlns:xsi="">
<soapenv:Header xmlns:wsa="" xmlns:wsse="">
<wsse:Security soapenv:actor="engbus" soapenv:mustUnderstand="1">
</wsse:UsernameToken>
</wsse:Security>
<wsa:From>
</wsa:From>
<wsa:Action>urn:Preisindikation/confirmOrder</wsa:Action>
<wsa:RelatesTo>f3d02d20e2821edfbaa386b6c489d7de</wsa:RelatesTo>
</soapenv:Header>
<soapenv:Body>
<ns0:cancelResponse>
<ns2:Buenummer>08-001</ns2:Buenummer>
</ns1:cancelResponse>

Could you please let me guide me to acheive this requirement?

 

Thanks

Ramu

entry.title: Re: AW01N - values for ordinary depreciation have changed...
entry.content: System required AFAR because previous FY has not been properly closed in legacy system  You mean to say FY-2024 within SAP if yes you are correct we haven’t yet close the FY-2024 because we went live on January which is still period 10 for L1 ledger (FYV- Apr to March). But when I try reproducing the same message in test environment after loading the legacy asset values this message is not showing even when I do the roll forward of 0L ledger (FAGLGVTR) still we are not getting the message in AW01N however the moment we carry forward the roll-forward for L1 ledger (FAGLGVTR) system is showing the message when we again open AW01N. But since we haven’t posted yet anything in Asset sub-ledger G/L account’s only balance carry forward happens for retained earnings account but not sure what it reason behind it and what SAP is expecting now in test environment. Have the users executed successfully all AFAR, all AFAB runs as well as AJAB for 2024?  In prod system yes they have firstly executed dep. run (AFAB) followed by (AFAR) and again run (AJAB). No changes happens in dep. areas with US-GAAP (dep. area 01,05,13,20,30) in posted value fields it’s showing posted in FY-2025 however for local-GAAP India depreciation books (dep. areas 02, 32) if we change to FY-2025 in AW01N for same asset system is not showing any values for local dep. area complete blank

entry.title: Re: Success factors Compensation and Bonus configurations

entry.title: Are you looking for learning material related to SAP Green Ledger and Financial Accounting ?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Discovering Sustainability for SAP Finance learning journey.

Overview
Sustainability is essential in today's economy and should be a primary focus of your business operations. Discover how SAP Green Ledger and Financial Accounting can monitor, evaluate, and report on the environmental impact of all your operations. Consultants and business professionals dedicated to advancing sustainability will find this learning opportunity to be valuable.

Learning objectives
This course will provide you with an understanding of how SAP Green Ledger relates to Financial Accounting. It's especially important for those who are new to using SAP Sustainability solutions to grasp the business advantages of SAP Green Ledger and how it aligns with your financial data. You'll also dive into key features, integration aspects, analytic capabilities, and planning.

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: sap BTP BUILD Apps no authorization for ABAP System
entry.content: did you try logging in Incoginito window or do a clear cookies once and try it

entry.title: Unlock Your SAP BTP Potential: Transformative Benefits of Functional and Technical Assistance
entry.content:
Are you struggling with the complexities of the SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) and seeking personalized guidance? Look no further! Functional and Technical Assistance Service for SAP BTP  is here to help you tackle these challenges by offering help to you to ensure that you are following SAP best practices and guidelines when transforming your solutions to the cloud. You get scenario-based assistance to stay on the right track and mitigate any risks that may come your way. The personalized guidance that you receive during this service will help you to adopt the solution and realize the business benefits sooner.

  1. Answering your Specific Questions
    One of the most significant benefits of this service is the ability to get answers to your specific questions. Whether you're dealing with a technical issue or just seeking advice on how to best utilize the platform, the experts at SAP are here to provide clear, tailored solutions. This personal touch ensures that you're not left in the dark and can move forward with confidence.
  2. Fast access to SAP experts
    With the Functional and Technical Assistance Service, you gain access to a dedicated team of SAP experts who are committed to your success. These experienced professionals provide guidance and support to help you navigate the complexities of SAP BTP and ensure your system is running smoothly. Whether you need assistance with configuration, customization, or troubleshooting, our experts are here to help you every step of the way.
    With this service, you're not stuck waiting around for help. SAP understands that time is money, and their team is dedicated to providing prompt, efficient support. No matter how complex your issues may be, the skilled professionals at SAP are on standby to assist you without delay by mapping your question to our cloud-based framework ensuring fast time-to-value.
  3. Flexible Interaction Model
    the service's flexible interaction model allows you to engage with experts in a way that works best for you. Whether you prefer one-on-one consultations, group workshops, or something in between, SAP's experts are ready to adapt to your preferred style of communication. This flexibility makes it easier than ever to get the help you need, when you need it.
  4. Scaleable Offering
    The offering is designed for scalability, allowing customers to easily purchase and adjust the level of assistance they need as their business requirements change. Availability through SAP Store means that the customers can bypass the traditional engagement process with an SAP account team and avoid lengthy contract negotiations. The service is offered at a fixed scope and price for each relevant country, with all pricing and scope details easily accessible on the SAP Store page. Customers can initiate the purchasing process directly from the page, making it simple and hassle-free to access the support they need.

From a customer perspective, there are several use cases where this new offering can prove to be invaluable.

  1. Application Development: When developing a new unique application using SAP Build, businesses can leverage the expertise of SAP consultants to ensure that the application meets their specific requirements and serves its intended purpose effectively. By understanding the nuances of SAP Build, consultants can guide businesses through the entire development process, from ideation to deployment, ensuring that the end product aligns with the organization's goals and objectives.
  2. Application Integration: in the realm of application integration, businesses can utilize SAP Logon within their applications to seamlessly connect with SAP systems and data. The service can provide insights on best practices for integrating SAP Logon, enabling businesses to optimize their application's performance and improve the overall user experience.
  3. Planning & Analytics: when it comes to planning and analytics, setting up and connecting with SAP Datashere can be a complex task. However, with the assistance of experienced SAP consultants, businesses can ensure that they are following best practices for setup and connectivity, ultimately enabling them to make informed, data-driven decisions and derive valuable insights from their SAP Datashere.
  4. Clean Core: the offering provides several benefits:
    1. It helps to identify and address any performance bottlenecks or inefficiencies in legacy code and gives advice on SAP BTP re-implementation, leading to improved system stability and reliability. This, in turn, allows you to focus on leveraging the full potential of the platform to drive your business forward.
    2. A clean core ensures that your SAP BTP implementation is aligned with best practices and industry standards, which is crucial for long-term success and scalability. By optimizing your core system, you can future-proof your SAP BTP implementation and ensure that it can support your business growth and innovation initiatives.

Overall, SAP's Functional and Technical Assistance Service for SAP BTP is a game-changer for businesses looking to maximize their investment in the platform. With personalized answers, quick access to experts, and flexible interaction, you'll be equipped to tackle any challenge that comes your way. Head over to the SAP Store and take advantage of this incredible offering today!

entry.title: Is there a way to get ABAP Usage data like SCMON for BTP ABAP Environment?
entry.content:
For on-premise system we use SCMON / UPL to log the usage of ABAP code. This helps in analysing the code for migration or decommissioning.

Is there any way to get similar usage data for SAP BTP, ABAP environment in the same system or via Cloud ALM?

Thanks in Advance.

Webinar: https://play.goconsensus.com/s312b05c3?fn=*%7CURL:FNAME%7C*&ln=*%7CURL:LNAME%7C*&em=*%7CURL:EMAIL%7C*&co=*%7CURL:COMPANY%7C*

entry.title: Re: Unable to add New Individual Customer on Lead Entity
entry.content: Latest news from dev: during testing we found some open issues, therefore this is expected to be activated in prod next week.

entry.title: Time bound CPM feedback requests - Customer influence - Please vote.
entry.content:
Hello SF community,

Continuous Feedback (CPM) is a very useful tool available on the SAP platform, used extensively to request and provide constructive and timely feedback to employees. Timely feedback reinforces positive behaviour and also impacts quality assessment. We have had instances where the feedback request has not been responded to for long durations or not at all. This results in an endless wait for the requestor and eventually they tune out of the conversation.

We suggest that the CPM feedback requests should be time bound with the option to configure the time duration. Also,  there should be a configurable reminder in place for a pending feedback request. Once the duration is crossed, the feedback request should get ‘auto declined’. This will result in a cleaner slate for the user(s) TO DO list and would put an end to the requestor’s long and at times a never-ending wait.

There is a customer influence for this, more details can be read here - Customer Influence . If you think this will be helpful for you, please vote for this customer influence idea. 

Kind Regards

HSBC

entry.title: Re: 'Forward as applicant' function to manually created p...
entry.content:
Forwarding as an applicant is available only when the candidate is on a requisition and all mandatory information is filled in the application. You cannot directly forward a candidate as an applicant from the candidate database, as the permission is defined in the candidate application.

Thanks,
Sanjeet

entry.title: Re: New Employee Business Partner Data Model in SAP S/4HANA 2020 On-Premise
entry.content:
Hi Erdal, 

thanks for reaching out. 
Please refer to SAP Note 3547273 - Manage HR-related business partners (HR-BPs in SAP S/4HANA) in a system landscape and the attached document. 

Best regards
Nicole

entry.title: Reading Vehicle Licence Plate (Vehicle Number Plate) Using Document Information Extraction
entry.content:
I am working on a project where I am using Document Information Extraction technology to extract text from vehicle number plates. This technology helps recognize and pull out the alphanumeric characters (text) displayed on number plates. However, I am facing challenges when it comes to extracting the color of the number plate. While the text extraction is not working properly and the color detection part isn't being detected, and the results are not accurate. I need help to improve this process so that I can reliably capture both the text (numbers and letters) and the color of the number plate from images.

I am looking for advice, suggestions, or best practices that could help resolve this issue and make the system work more efficiently.

Specifically, I want to ensure that both the text and color extraction happen smoothly and accurately in my project.
@tomasz_janasz @MariaGoepfert 

Document Information Extraction

entry.title: Re: In-House Repair in S/4HANA Service - Start with an Overview
entry.content:
Hi Udo,

All good. The error was because of Serial number profile. 

I have one more question:

With the decide option, we can create a service order, service quotation, and return order. However, the return order is created only once. Is there any limitation on how many times a service order or service quotation can be created?

regards

Sambit

entry.title: Base ratio is calculated on the Production Order row level.
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

Please guide us on how Base ratio is calculated on the Production Order row level.

The screenshot is attached below for your reference.

Regards,

Amir Sayyed.

entry.title: Re: 🧰👷‍♂️ The SAP S/4HANA RISE & SAP BTP - Toolbox 👷‍♂️🧰
entry.content:

Webinar: https://play.goconsensus.com/sab5a0373?fn=*%7CURL:FNAME%7C*&ln=*%7CURL:LNAME%7C*&em=*%7CURL:EMAIL%7C*&co=*%7CURL:COMPANY%7C*

entry.title: Re: RAP / Restful Application Programming Model: Projecte...
entry.content:
@Zerhat 

To enable draft creation for an associated entity, use the syntax below:

association _Booking { create ; with draft; }

Please also refer to the following document:

https://help.sap.com/docs/ABAP_PLATFORM_NEW/fc4c71aa50014fd1b43721701471913d/982a40c45eba4443b2b6a25f824023fa.html

entry.title: Re: Send reminder notification to manager after 48 hours...
entry.content:
As of now, reminder notifications are not supported for talent status pipeline emails.

Thanks,
Sanjeet

The main challenge, connecting to multiple customer systems, both if we connect their systems to our cloud connector or their cloud connecters to our global account, is still there.

entry.title: Re: Setup and usage of contract accounts
entry.content:
Hi Henk.

I would go for different types (e.g. Utilities and a new one for Sales) having different number ranges. Makes life easier, when you run mass activities and do the selection via contract account numbers.

BR,
Sascha

entry.title: Re: how do i implement an odata api for an cds view entity with parameters in integration suite
entry.content: did you find a solution yet? Having the same issue.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere Tenant migration made possible
entry.content:
Hi @albertosimeoni,

currently you need to migrate your DSP, yes.
Reason is that when provisioning BDC, a new, empty DSP is created for you.

It is planned by SAP to have a central migration plan later this year. Until then, our service can support.
BR,

Thore

entry.content:

We add fields in CDS View C_TRIALBALANCEQ0001 :

when i run the general balance tile, i get the following warning messages :

In configuration of component FIS_FPM_SEARCH_GENERIC_TRIAL1, i have this :

 

Names appear to be truncated.

Where should I make the correction? I am a new user of SAP Fiori and CDS View, I speak French much better than English. Please give me detailed explanations if you have the solution.

Thanks in advance to all.

entry.title: Re: Material Serial Number Error
entry.content: Former members are usually not active anymore, better ask your own question in Q&A (or perform more search)

entry.title: Re: Familiarize with Future of Analytics “SAP Business Data Cloud “
entry.content: Very Informative

entry.title: Re: Enterprise Management Layer for SAP S/4HANA – What’s New – Release 2023
entry.content:
Hi bikrambagchi,

Petra left SAP.

You need to first technically upgrade your system from SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 2022 to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 2023, probably FPS02 or FPS03. To get the EML 2023 content, we are now on FPS02, you would need to acquire a new image of our template. Note we are currently working on the FPS03 version with planned release in May 2025.

Regards,

Xavier

entry.title: What means MOD in Snote 397870 - MOD: BV an Nicht-Liefertermin wg. Fixierungshorizont
entry.content:
Hello together

Can you explain me how must I understand MOD in the title of the SNote 397870.

Is a change in the coding now also considered a modification? 
In other new SNotes in which coding is also changed, there is no mention of a modification.

Please explain

BR Christenberger

entry.title: Compensation Statements integration with FileNet using SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi Community,

Compensation statements, generated and accessible within the SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central under Compensation portlet, are available for all employees enrolled in a compensation plan. We want to transfer these statements from SAP SuccessFactors to FileNet using SAP Cloud Platform Integration.

We are currently unable to identify the backend entity associated with the compensation statements within SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central (EC). Could you kindly provide guidance on how to fetch the compensation statements from SAP SuccessFactors EC. Could you kindly advise if there is any workaround solution to facilitate the integration from SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central (EC) to FileNet?

Thanks & Best Regards,
Pavan


Cloud Integration SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central

entry.title: SAP Business Suite – The Integrated Powerhouse for Seamless Product Lifecycle Management
entry.content:
As businesses across all industries navigate the competitive landscape of today's economy, they are realizing the vital importance of effective product data management. To truly outpace competitors, it's essential to have a solution that seamlessly orchestrates the product definition throughout your organization.

Orchestration requires a new era of enterprise management, and the SAP Business Suite is leading the way with unparalleled applications to link your entire supply chain processes with the rest of your enterprise.  Fueling your enterprise with unmatched data that is integrated real-time with operational and business data ensuring every decision is guided by accurate, and in-the-moment insights. Powered with embedded AI to deliver productivity and efficiency across your enterprise.

Let’s explore further how the SAP Business Suite is a comprehensive system of record for managing and all product data for an organization and how this approach allows for value realization across the supply chain.

Simplifying Product Data Management

SAP provides an ERP-driven product data management solution that leverages the integrated and innovative capabilities of SAP Business Suite. This integrated approach prioritizes collaboration, compliance, and sustainability, and transforms how industries handle product information in process and discrete industries.

The SAP strategy for our solutions is centered around customer choice. Within the product lifecycle management market category, we will have the following focus areas:

  • Product Data Management as part of our Business Suite and
  • Integration with external PLM and CAD systems

Overview Product Lifecycle Strategy with SAP Solutions

This strategy provides the ultimate flexibility for customers to choose how they want to unlock the potential that exists from performing product data management with the SAP Business Suite. We see three areas where SAP is uniquely positioned to simplify and streamline your end-to-end supply chain processes, including support for hybrid scenarios, regardless of your industry:

  • Direct CAD Integration: for discrete industry customers needing direct CAD tool integration to manage design files and who want to create and manage product data and product structures through a seamless connection to the SAP Business Suite for execution.
  • Product Data Management: for those customers in both process and discrete industries, who want a native cloud-based product data management platform to create and manage their product definitions with a seamless connection to the SAP Business Suite.
  • PLM System Integration: Ideal for those customers with existing external PLM systems who want a bi-directional flow of product information into the SAP Business Suite to ensure smooth communication and coordination across different systems.

Let’s now dive a bit deeper into examples of these scenarios.

Collaborative Product Data Management for Discrete Industries

Customers in discrete industries have needs to not only manage and control product data that defines their products, but also to directly integrate their authoring tool systems (MCAD and ECAD).  By providing a flexible approach to directly manage their design files coming from various authoring tools, customers can seamlessly create the product structures needed in the SAP Business Suite.  Doing so facilitates the ability to collaborate on this data and to handover the product definition for planning, sourcing, manufacturing, and maintenance.

Direct CAD Integration and Product Data Management

Our focus for these customers is to continue to enhance essential product data management capabilities within the SAP Business Suite and to extend these capabilities beyond the SAP Business Suite with differentiating capabilities, such as collaboration, product structure management and product handover and others. This natively integrated approach fosters not only the efficient sharing of product data across the value chain, but also supports the bi-directional change management process critical for all organizations.

Recipe Formulation and Specification Management for Process Industries

Customers in process industries have needs to manage and control the data that defines their products, but instead of this data being in the form of parts and bills of materials, they are dealing with formulated products where their product data is defined by specifications, recipes and formulations. Not only do they want to manage and control this information, but they also want to easily collaborate internally and externally on it and then easily handover the product definition into ERP system for execution.

Recipe Formulation and Specification Management for Process Industries

For process industries, we are enhancing our capabilities to support these customers and how the create and manage the recipe formulation and specification management processes. All while maintaining full native integration with SAP Business Suite, where the SAP offering stands out due to its integration into compliance, sustainability, and network functionalities. This ensures meticulous product data management that adheres to industry regulations and sustainability targets and efficient sharing of product data across the value chain, but also supports the bi-directional change management process critical for all organizations.

Integration with Leading Third Party PLM and CAD Solutions

Lastly, there are customers who have taken a decision for an external PLM system like Siemens Teamcenter, Dassault Systèmes 3DEXPERIENCE, PTC Windchill or Autodesk Vault to store product design data that also may be originating from an authoring tool. These customers also want to have their product design information seamlessly flow into the ERP environments to streamline supply chain process.

Integration with Leading 3rd Party PLM and CAD Solutions

SAP supports these customers as well by providing a proven and standards-based integration solution that allows for them to have a single source of truth for product data within the SAP Business Suite, enabling not only the efficient sharing of product data across the value chain, but also the bi-directional change management process for the organizations. Additionally, these customers can leverage additional SAP capabilities to support potential hybrid scenarios such as supplier collaboration and visualization.

Customer Choice with SAP

Leveraging the SAP Business Suite as your product data management backbone ensures that all aspects of product data are efficiently managed and utilized. By offering tailored solutions for both discrete and process industries, SAP empowers businesses to streamline their product data management processes, ensuring a single source of product truth for the enterprise.

SAP Business Suite goes beyond traditional PLM systems by integrating seamlessly product data with essential business tools and processes, driving efficiency and coherence throughout the organization. Our solutions focus on their unique strengths as integrated components rather than standalone systems, ensuring a comprehensive approach to product data management. While our support for hybrid scenarios further enhances flexibility and collaboration across the value chain.

Embark on a transformative journey with SAP and experience the future of ERP-driven product data management. Let’s unify, innovate, and excel together.

For each of the above described three areas where SAP is uniquely positioned to simplify and streamline your end-to-end supply chain processes, we will publish soon more detailed blogs. Stay tuned! For more information about our solutions for product lifecycle management, please visit the SAP website, or join our SAP Community by following the Product Lifecycle Management tag.

entry.title: How can we know the number of customer invoices sent by email to partner ZM for a specific year?
entry.content:
Indeed, I tried with the VBRK table or the VPBA table but I have no solutions. Would it be possible to have a method to obtain these invoices? in the SAP ECC

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Error CX_SADL_DUMP_DATABASE_FAILURE
entry.content:
Hello, we have a dump with Error CX_SADL_DUMP_DATABASE_FAILURE : 

I don't know how to find where the RTRIM expression is used in error.

I am a new SAP Fiori and CDS view user, I speak much better French than English. Please detail your answers if you have a solution to propose to me.
Thanks in advance to all.

entry.title: Table Input Format for Anomaly Detection in HANA_ML
entry.content:
I run into an issue with anomaly detection when using HANA_ML. I have a table in in SAP HANA with numeric columns in format DOUBLE. I created it in two variants:

HC_TABLE1 with just the data

HC_TABLE2 the same data but also having an ID columns

Now training an IsolationForsest with the data works fine and I can save the model:

iso_forest = IsolationForest(
max_samples =2048,
n_estimators=100, # Number of trees
max_features=458, # Use all features from the table
random_state=1, # For reproducibility
thread_ratio=0.9 # Parallel processing
)

hana_df1 = conn.table('HC_TABLE1')

result = iso_forest.fit(hana_df1)

However predicting the outliers does NOT work:

hana_df2 = conn.table('HC_TABLE2')

predictions = iso_forest.predict(hana_df2, key='ID')

ERROR:hana_ml.algorithms.pal.preprocessing:HANA version: 2.00.078.00.1715149848 (fa/hana2sp07). (423, 'AFL error: AFL DESCRIBE for nested call failed - invalid table(s) for ANY-procedure call (Input table 0: column 0 has invalid SQL type.): line 33 col 1 (at pos 8351)')

How can I identify what is going wrong here? I can train a model but never use it? The exactly same data which was used for fitting is not accepted for doing predictions. I am close to ditching HANA_ML completely and using the real python ML routines instead.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community Events in Warsaw - 2025
entry.content: Amazing ! Looking forward to it, and happy to be speak again if there's an opportunity )

entry.title: Re: Remove UOM from value from query result set from FIOR...
entry.content:
You can hide/remove it via local annotations in annotation.xml file.

 

            <Annotations Target="cds_zsd_schd_line.ZC_SCHD_LINEType/CorrectedQtyInOrderQtyUnit">
                <Annotation Term="Measures.Unit" String= " "/>
            </Annotations>

 

by providing Annotation Term "Measures.Unit" String = "" on field itself.

Make sure you provide also the reference namespace in the annotation file:

 

    <edmx:Reference Uri="https://oasis-tcs.github.io/odata-vocabularies/vocabularies/Org.OData.Measures.V1.xml">
        <edmx:Include Namespace="Org.OData.Measures.V1" Alias="Measures"/>
    </edmx:Reference>

 

 Complete annotation.xml file:

 

<edmx:Edmx xmlns:edmx="http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/ns/edmx" Version="4.0">
    <edmx:Reference Uri="https://oasis-tcs.github.io/odata-vocabularies/vocabularies/Org.OData.Measures.V1.xml">
        <edmx:Include Namespace="Org.OData.Measures.V1" Alias="Measures"/>
    </edmx:Reference>
    <edmx:Reference Uri="https://sap.github.io/odata-vocabularies/vocabularies/UI.xml">
        <edmx:Include Namespace="com.sap.vocabularies.UI.v1" Alias="UI"/>
    </edmx:Reference>
    <edmx:Reference Uri="/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZUI_SCHD_LINE/$metadata">
        <edmx:Include Namespace="cds_zsd_schd_line"/>
    </edmx:Reference>
    <edmx:DataServices>
        <Schema xmlns="http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/ns/edm" Namespace="local">
            <Annotations Target="cds_zsd_schd_line.ZC_SCHD_LINEType/CorrectedQtyInOrderQtyUnit">
                <Annotation Term="Measures.Unit" String= " "/>
            </Annotations>
        </Schema>
    </edmx:DataServices>
</edmx:Edmx>

entry.title: Re: Script to extract measure values and loop through the...
entry.content:
Hi there,

As a simple example, the code below will loop through all measure values in the table,
As soon as a value is greater than 282 - the script will launch an application message or a text box etc.
I've created 2 buttons one for each...

var arr = Table_3.getDataSource().getResultSet();

for (var i=0;i<arr.length;i++)
	{   var string = arr[i][Alias.MeasureDimension].rawValue;	    
                    var number = ConvertUtils.stringToNumber(string);		     
if(number>282)   {		Text_1.setVisible(true);	break	   }}	
var arr = Table_3.getDataSource().getResultSet();

for (var i=0;i<arr.length;i++)
	{   var string = arr[i][Alias.MeasureDimension].rawValue;	    
                    var number = ConvertUtils.stringToNumber(string);		     
if(number>282)   {		Application.showMessage(ApplicationMessageType.Info,"test");	break	   }}

Henrike

Hi Tom,
Thanks for the great overview!

We've just published a new interest group just for BTP FinOps, you're more then welcome to join: 

https://community.sap.com/t5/cloud-finops/gh-p/cloud-finops

Eran

entry.title: Re: What's New in SAP Asset Performance Management 2502
entry.content:
Hi Shrisendu,

Thanks for the question.

User Notification -  This feature enable the user to generate fiori notifications which can be monitored in the APM application's notifications button (Bell Button). In addition to fiori notifications this feature also enables the user to recieve e-mails in the configured e-mail id's.

You can enable user notification by following the below steps.

1. Enable 'User Notification' option in the corresponding rule output. 

2. Configure the e-mail of the reciepients in the corresponding rule settings.

3. To receive e-mail notifications, ensure that a destination is configured. For more information, see  https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_APM/8c95dca44fda4d56a17f6494f421758d/baff10b05ab94ad1860abbe7ce5f2825.html 

4. In Fiori Launch pad settings (User) enable the required option (Enabled by default)

Thanks & Regards

Bejoy

entry.title: Re: SAP Developer Challenge March - SAP Community Escape House - AI 🤖🧠
entry.content: i did, please read the hints @mvaibhav

App: Import Financial Plan Data -->Open Application Log

 

Is there a possibility to get more information about it? It's crucial for us to see what values our business users have uploaded.

 

Thank you very much and best regards,

Annika

entry.title: Re: How to customize the scale unit of a measure
entry.content: This was broken in the Q1 2025. A patch was just released this past week. It now works with tables again

entry.title: Re: S4 Public cloud 2408 - 3SL - Customizing tenant ( Cre...
entry.content:
Hi @SamHilton,

Can we create a custom Z package in the customizing tenant?

No, in the customizing (100) tenant, you cannot create packages.
If you need to create a package, add it in the dev (080) tenant, and it will automatically appear in the customizing tenant.

BR, Oleg

entry.title: How to Display the Supplier's Additional Name in the SAP Business ByDesign Purchase Order Form?
entry.content:
Could you please guide me on how to display the Supplier's Additional Name in the SAP Business ByDesign Purchase Order Form? Additionally, I would appreciate it if you could provide the XML path used for data integration in Adobe Cycle Designer. For example, an XML path like the one below:

$.PurchaseOrder.SellerParty.FormAddress.CorrespondenceLanguageName.languageCode

entry.title: Re: SAP Central Business Configuration – Collection_Outdated
entry.content:
Hi Andreas,

credentials for all source systems are deployed during provisioning process via automated processes require no manual intervention and should not be touched from your side to avoid  braking the trust setup between systems connected.

In case you made manual interventions please open a support case for further analysis to the responsible team for the area where the problem occurs to rebuild the integration.

Regards,

Lucian

entry.title: Read custom fields with SCIM API V2
entry.content:
Hello Community,

we rcently migrated IAS from API V1 to SCIM API V2 and we have custom transformations that do not work anymore.

We used to read 2 custom fields in the Source transformations and then we added conditions in the Target transformations, but it seems that the custom fields are not read anymore.

How can we read custom fields with SCIM API V2?

in the Source transformation we added this:

{
"sourcePath": "$['urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:successfactors:2.0:User']['IASsync']",
"optional": true,
"targetPath": "$['urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:successfactors:2.0:User']['IASsync']"
},

where IASsync is the technical name of the custom field we have in SF.

then in Target trasnformation we added a condition:

($.IASsync != '2046299')

where '2046299' is the picklist OptionID for the value 'NO'. Previoulsy this worked and users with IASsync=NO where skipped and not synced in IAS, which is our objective.

Any help is appreciated since we are stuck with it!

thanks

entry.title: How to build a document flow in onboarding without preventing the completion of the hiring process
entry.content:
During the hiring process, documents like policies or forms should be signed by onboardees. Some of these documents need to be signed to complete the hiring process. The rest can be signed later or in parallel with administrative actions in Manage Pending Hire. Before the 2H2024 release, it was not possible to split the signature steps. Introducing Primary and Secondary Tasks in the program is now possible.

To learn how to configure primary and secondary tasks with document flow, review the blog 

SuccessFactors Onboarding: The New "Primary and Secondary New Hire Tasks" Step 

The key information that you need to know:

  • If a document step is added after secondary tasks, for example, in the program, please add one required custom task in the secondary tasks

  • When the custom task in the secondary tasks is completed, the document step will appear under New Hire Tasks and not in data collection, and it will not prevent the hiring process. Therefore, the onboardee will be available in Manage Pending Hire.

  • If you have two document steps, the first one after data collection to be completed before Manage Pending Hire, and the second one after the secondary tasks, you can assign the documents to the proper document step in the rule using the process variant step name.

entry.title: CrystalReport DB Access Live Data
entry.content:

our management Software "open" the Report and print the data in the Layout.

is this correct?

#Crys

entry.title: Compare net value from 2024 with 2025 unter Sales Order Report
entry.content:
Hey all, 
is there a way to compare, for example, the net value from 2024 with the net value from 2025, in a sales order report (net value 2024 - net value 2025)?

 

AccountNet Value 2024Net Value 20252024-2025
ABC Company50.00030.00020.000
DEF Company350.000380.000- 30.000

I can't find out how to compare two values from different years. I tried under key figures.

Kind regards and thank you for your help.

entry.title: Re: Base ratio is calculated on the Production Order row...
entry.content:
Hi @Krishna42 ,

For standard components: The Base Ratio is typically the same as the Base Quantity. It is calculated by dividing the component's quantity by the planned quantity of the finished good in the production order header.

For sub-BOM components: The Base Ratio is calculated by dividing the sub-BOM component item quantity over the Finished Goods Item Completed Quantity of the same sub-BOM.

I hope it helps.

*** Please, if this answer resolves your question, kindly consider marking it as accepted. This helps our community by highlighting useful solutions. Thank you! ***

BR,
Felipe
